subject: Hirudegarn in insectoid first-form, a massive carapaced demonic creature with multiple limbs looming against a dark atmospheric background
suspected_ip: Hirudegarn (Dragon Ball Z: Wrath of the Dragon)
description: A massive creature dominates the frame, rendered in dark greens, browns, and blacks. The creature has a heavily armored, insect-like carapace with segmented plates visible across its body. Multiple thick limbs are present. The scale of the creature is enormous relative to the composition — it fills the frame suggesting something city-block or building-sized. The background is a dark, chaotic atmosphere with hints of energy or destruction. The creature's form is more insectoid than humanoid, consistent with a demon or kaiju-class entity in its initial sealed/contained form. The image quality at 624×871 limits fine structural detail but the overall impression is a massive defensive armored monster.
foreground: massive insectoid carapaced creature with segmented armor plates and multiple thick limbs
emotion: impassive, immovable, threatening mass — no readable expression at this scale
